description: After repeated truncated reads of the same URL, agent should call done with what it has and tell user the response is partial.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://www.example.com/long-page — Title: Long page]

summarize this page

args.summary: Summary of the visible portion: [synthesis of Section A and B]. The page is large and read_page returned truncated content twice — I've summarized what I can see.

antiPatterns.reason: Third identical read won't yield more.

expected.successRubric: Deliver a summary of what is visible. Acknowledge the truncation. Don't loop.
